title: Consultation Paper on Guidelines for Privacy Protection and Data Protection in the Telecommunications Sector
summary: Proposed sector-specific privacy and data protection rules for licensed telecommunications operators and led to the 2024 final direction and guidelines.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Consulted on telecom-sector privacy and data protection guidelines.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Consultation on telecom privacy and data protection guidance.

notes: Related instruments: Final Direction on Guidelines on the Privacy of Individuals and Data Protection in the Telecommunications Sector
